title: Better governance and decentralization of funding for sustainable mountain tourism in the Southern Romanian Carpathians
description: A practice abstract on improving governance and decentralization of funding to bolster sustainable mountain tourism in the Southern Romanian Carpathians. It identifies the need for stronger regional governance to support local small-scale producers and stricter planning regulations, and advocates for localized decision-making through stakeholder-led funding mechanisms such as the Țara Făgărașului Intercommunity Development Association.
